reviews.review_description:
This game is something else 
Love the lighting love the map love how it is different and the sound effects are top notch

I swear really u have to get this game it is brilliant you’ll be glad u have it afterwords

reviews.review_title: One of my fav fan games ngl.
reviews.review_description: It is so well made considering it being out for not so long. Already had a lobby of 6-7 which to me is crazy
